pendingPlan.storyName: How to Build a Car — Basic VR Training

moments.name: Introduction
moments.spatialContext: Player positioned at assembly station workbench

moments.name: Install Engine Block
moments.userAction: Grab EngineBlock and place into ChassisPlacePoint
moments.successHint: Positive audio cue and green outline confirmation when engine block locks into place
moments.spatialContext: Engine block on left workbench, chassis centered 1.5m ahead at waist height

moments.name: Connect Engine Components
moments.userAction: Attach PowerCable, CoolantHose, and DriveBelt to engine block connection points
moments.successHint: Each component snaps with haptic feedback and completion checklist updates
moments.spatialContext: Components on right workbench, connection points highlighted on installed engine block

moments.name: Mount the Doors
moments.userAction: Grab LeftDoor and RightDoor and attach to door hinge place points
moments.successHint: Door alignment animation plays and lock sound confirms successful mounting
moments.spatialContext: Doors positioned on floor racks left and right, hinge points at shoulder height on chassis

moments.name: Install Windshield
moments.userAction: Grab Windshield and place into WindshieldFrame, then apply SealingTool around edges
moments.successHint: Glass clicks into frame, then progress bar fills as sealing tool traces perimeter
moments.spatialContext: Windshield on front rack, frame at eye level on chassis front

moments.name: Fit Hood and Trunk
moments.userAction: Attach Hood to front hinges and TrunkLid to rear hinges
moments.successHint: Each panel aligns with magnetic snap and outline turns green
moments.spatialContext: Hood on front table, trunk lid on rear table, both at waist height

moments.name: Install Wheels
moments.userAction: Use WheelGun to attach FrontLeftWheel, FrontRightWheel, RearLeftWheel, and RearRightWheel
moments.successHint: Wheel gun trigger animation with ratcheting sound, checklist updates for each wheel
moments.spatialContext: Wheels on ground around chassis, wheel gun on tool rack at waist height

moments.name: Interior Setup
moments.userAction: Install SteeringWheel onto steering column and place DriverSeat onto seat rails
moments.successHint: Steering wheel locks with click, seat slides forward and locks with confirmation tone
moments.spatialContext: Components inside vehicle cabin, accessible through open door

moments.name: Final Walkthrough
moments.userAction: Use InspectionTablet to verify all assembly points, then sign completion form
moments.successHint: Green checkmarks appear on tablet for each verified component, final signature triggers completion celebration
moments.spatialContext: Tablet spawns in hand, player walks around completed vehicle for 360-degree inspection
